LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DIEGO CORONELMANA, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. HEARING IS HELD. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT RULES AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. COUNSEL IS INSTRUCTED TO REPRESENT TO THE COURT THAT THE FOLLOWING CONDTIONS WILL BE MET BUT WILL NOT BE FORMALLY STATED IN AN ORDER: COUNSEL IS TO SEND AN EMAIL TO MR. CORONELMENA INFORMING HIM THAT THE MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL HAS BEEN GRANTED AND THAT A COPY OF THE ORDER IS TO BE SENT TO HIM. MR. CORONELMENA IS TO ALSO BE INFORMED OF THE UPCOMING TRIAL DATE OF APRIL 8, 2019. COUNSEL AGREES TO MEET THESE CONDITIONS. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE COURT REPORTER TRANSCRIPTS). ORDER IS SIGNED. DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'S MOTION TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS NOTICE OF SUBMISSION ON PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DEEM MATTER ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO FILE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION (SET ONE) WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO DUE SO WILL RESULT IN ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION BEING DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM INTRODUCTING ANY EVIDENCE CONTRARY TO SAID ADMISSIONS. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $360.00 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST DEFENDANT, PAYMENT OF WHICH MUST BE MADE WITHIN THE (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM TO THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENATIVE RULING AND APPROVED AS TO FORM AND SUBMIT TO JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE AT RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Lisa D. Dubowski, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express National Bank, f/k/a American Express Centurion Bank.
No appearance by defendant Diego R. Coronelmena, a/k/a Diego R. Coronel, a/k/a Diego Ro Coronelmena, a/k/a Diego Roberto Coronelmena, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on April 2, 2018.
Defendant's answer was filed on August 27, 2018.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on November 16, 2018.
Declaration of Robert J. Rebhan in Lieu of Live Testimony was filed and served on February 13, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, April 8, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express National Bakn, f/k/a American Express Centurion Bank, and against defendant Diego R. Coronelmena, a/k/a Diego R. Coronel, a/k/a Diego Ro Coronelmena, a/k/a Diego Roberto Coronelmena, an individual, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $15,651.39.
Costs - $751.78.
Total - $16,403.17.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jennifer Tunder, Esq., Law Offices of Robert S. Gitmeid, counsel for Plaintiff and moving to be relieved; (CourtCall)
No other appearance.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DIEGO CORONELMANA, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED.

Counsel is instructed to represent to the Court that the following condtions will be met but will not be formally stated in an order:

Counsel is to send an email to Mr. Coronelmena informing him that the motion to be relieved as counsel has been granted and that a copy of the order is to be sent to him. Mr. Coronelmena is to also be informed of the upcoming trial date of April 8, 2019. Counsel agrees to meet these conditions. (as fully reported in the Court Reporter transcripts)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions Notice Of Submission On Plaintiffs Motion To Deem Matters Admitted

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'S Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions Notice Of Submission On Plaintiffs Motion To Deem Matters Admitted

NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DEEM MATTER ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. ACCORDINGLY THE COURT WILL ENTER AN ORDER AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO FILE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION (SET ONE) WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO DUE SO WILL RESULT IN ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION BEING DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM INTRODUCTING ANY EVIDENCE CONTRARY TO SAID ADMISSIONS. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $360.00 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST DEFENDANT, PAYMENT OF WHICH MUST BE MADE WITHIN THE (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM TO THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENATIVE RULING AND APPROVED AS TO FORM AND SUBMIT TO JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE AT rennepar85@gmail.com
